cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)

add_executable(donner_examples_custom_css_parser
  custom_css_parser.cc
)
target_include_directories(donner_examples_custom_css_parser PRIVATE ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR})
set_target_properties(donner_examples_custom_css_parser PROPERTIES CXX_STANDARD 20 CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED YES)
target_compile_options(donner_examples_custom_css_parser PRIVATE -fno-exceptions)
target_link_libraries(donner_examples_custom_css_parser PRIVATE donner_base_element_fake_element donner_css_core donner_css_css donner_css_parser_parser donner_third_party_libc_compat_libc_compat donner_third_party_libc_compat_libcxx_macos_compat gmock)

)

endif()

endif()
